base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of gym_leaders_8 — a character (boss) from 1996 pokemon red blue. 8 Gym Leaders (Brock/Misty/Lt Surge/Erika/Sabrina/Koga/Blaine/Giovanni) + badge rewards. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
